title: TFC Modular
description: This is a compatibility addon for TFC and Truly Modular API. Bring your Terrafirmacraft tools to life.
body:
TFC Modular is a compatibility bridge for Truly Modular API that lets you create custom, modular tools and weapons using TFC materials. With Terrafirmacraft themed modules, you'll be able to log, chisel, prospect and more with these fully customisable items. The mod is fully data driven thanks to Truly Modular API allowing developers to add custom modules that can use both Truly Moduar and TFC Modular properties.

Special thanks to the TFC dev team for existing and Smartin for helping me figure out how to use the API.
